_publications._publicationTitle: Dose-dependent effects of focal fractionated irradiation on secondary malignant neoplasms in Nf1 mutant mice.

_contextSnippet: highest incidence of myeloid malignancies in Nf1+/− mutant mice that received 15 Gy of CI (0 Gy vs. 15 Gy: p=0.031, 15 Gy vs. 30 Gy: p=0.017, Fisher exact tests)
details: Highest incidence of myeloid malignancies occurred at 15 Gy dose (0 Gy vs. 15 Gy: p=0.031, 15 Gy vs. 30 Gy: p=0.017)
